item_name: Dry your hands with a paper towel completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note for drying your hands with a paper towel, shown as a simple hygiene verification card beside a sink, folded paper towels, and a clean drying area. The note should communicate that the final drying step was completed, with hand-drying motion icons and a moisture-to-dry visual sequence that makes it clearly about post-wash hygiene procedure, without readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future clinical-home aesthetic: soft bright lighting, realistic paper, ceramic, and metal textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the card centered and the sink environment clean and uncluttered.
